role_leakage_notes.landscape: Heavy leakage: R2 reasoning relies primarily on Regulatory and Meta evidence (delineator posts, road markings) to override its own landscape assessment.
role_leakage_notes.botanics: Heavy leakage: R2 reasoning relies primarily on Regulatory and Meta evidence (delineator posts, road markings) to override its own botanical assessment.
role_leakage_notes.regulatory: Heavy leakage: R2 reasoning relies primarily on Landscape and Botanics evidence (vegetation types) to override its own regulatory assessment.
role_leakage_notes.meta: Heavy leakage: R2 reasoning relies primarily on Regulatory and Landscape/Botany evidence to override its own meta assessment.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge's synthesis is weak and circular. It relies entirely on the flawed consensus of the specialist agents (who all hallucinated Brazil-specific infrastructure cues) and fails to perform any independent verification against the image. The judge accepts the incorrect 'Brazil' conclusion without noting the lack of linguistic evidence or the ambiguity of the visual cues.
